title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Senior Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
